data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to streamline decision-making on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic interface design with focused menu options.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Prioritizes key content placement to improve recall and recognition.
data.technical_spec: Top recommendations positioned at the fore, leveraging recency and primacy effects.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design focused on making interactive components easily actionable.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for navigation and content interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures the platform is intuitively beautiful, increasing user engagement.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color scheme, typography, and layout enhancing visual appeal.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations for familiar navigation patterns.
data.technical_spec: Standardized layout elements consistent with common streaming interfaces.
